TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: magal kanailil icami ka matuuwal (masiqun kakawsa) san ku magal kanailil. kiya ku magal kanailil yi tinqalangang niyam iwan na rahuwal na uwawu qutux naniqan kaxbarg. imuwag naku makurakis/marakiyas sumilma cu qasinu ru quwawu na turakis sipaqaneq cu rumaruma, makurakis/marakiyas bali nanak ku magawp mapa-iyu uwi cu qaraqarax ka sasilhu inlungang. pasibaqan cu kai naku malhow, sasilawkahan naku rawirawing ku inha.
S.PHON: maɣal kanailil iʦ~ʨami ka matuuwal (mas~ɕiqun kakaws~ɕa) s~ɕan ku maɣal kanailil. kija ku maɣal kanailil ji tinqalaŋaŋ nijam iwan na raħuwal na uwawu qutux naniqan kaxβarɣ. imuwaɣ naku makurakis~ɕ/marakijas~ɕ s~ɕumilma ʦ~ʨu qas~ɕinu ru quwawu na turakis~ɕ s~ɕipaqaneq ʦ~ʨu rumaruma, makurakis~ɕ/marakijas~ɕ βali nanak ku maɣawp mapa-iju uwi ʦ~ʨu qaraqarax ka s~ɕas~ɕilħu inluŋaŋ. pas~ɕiβaqan ʦ~ʨu kai naku malħow, s~ɕas~ɕilawkaħan naku rawirawiŋ ku inħa.
S.FORM: magal kanailil icami ka matuuwal (masiqun kakawsa) san ku magal kanailil. kiya ku magal kanailil yi tinqalangang niyam iwan na rahuwal na uwawu qutux naniqan kaxbarg. imuwag naku makurakis/marakiyas sumilma cu qasinu ru quwawu na turakis sipaqaneq cu rumaruma, makurakis/marakiyas bali nanak ku magawp mapa-iyu uwi cu qaraqarax ka sasilhu inlungang. pasibaqan cu kai naku malhow, sasilawkahan naku rawirawing ku inha.
S.PHON: maɣal kanailil iʦ~ʨami ka matuuwal (mas~ɕiqun kakaws~ɕa) s~ɕan ku maɣal kanailil. kija ku maɣal kanailil ji tinqalaŋaŋ nijam iwan na raħuwal na uwawu qutux naniqan kaxβarɣ. imuwaɣ naku makurakis~ɕ/marakijas~ɕ s~ɕumilma ʦ~ʨu qas~ɕinu ru quwawu na turakis~ɕ s~ɕipaqaneq ʦ~ʨu rumaruma, makurakis~ɕ/marakijas~ɕ βali nanak ku maɣawp mapa-iju uwi ʦ~ʨu qaraqarax ka s~ɕas~ɕilħu inluŋaŋ. pas~ɕiβaqan ʦ~ʨu kai naku malħow, s~ɕas~ɕilawkaħan naku rawirawiŋ ku inħa.
